poseMap.relationshipJob: Anchor a new user at the Lobby threshold before any executive pressure appears.
poseMap.allowedGesture: calm vertical wait, one hand near ledger or bell, one hand relaxed, shoulders uneven and human
poseMap.forbiddenCEOOrCRODrift: arms crossed, podium stillness, skyline stance, sales-floor lean, whiteboard energy
poseMap.motionAffordance: subtle breathing, tiny bell polish, glasses catchlight

poseMap.relationshipJob: Make the elevator and next step feel possible.
poseMap.allowedGesture: low open palm, small keycard-presenting angle, soft asymmetrical smile
poseMap.forbiddenCEOOrCRODrift: power handshake thrust, pointed command, chin-raised executive arrival, forward CRO lunge
poseMap.rowanHintPolicy: keycard ring allowed but not emphasized
poseMap.motionAffordance: small hand lift and settle; reduced-motion freeze remains welcoming

poseMap.relationshipJob: Show that Otis reads user nerves before moving them upstairs.
poseMap.allowedGesture: slight lean toward user, ledger lowered, glasses angled, hands visible
poseMap.forbiddenCEOOrCRODrift: interrogation posture, folded arms, boardroom assessment, competitive smirk
poseMap.motionAffordance: micro nod and soft shoulder shift

poseMap.relationshipJob: Turn overwhelm into a practical next step.
poseMap.allowedGesture: one hand near ledger edge or glasses, eyes kind, body still but not severe
poseMap.forbiddenCEOOrCRODrift: chin steeple, executive strategy silhouette, tactical planning stance, red-pen emphasis
poseMap.rowanHintPolicy: ledger may show a plain ivory edge but no readable card
poseMap.motionAffordance: brief pause, tiny glance toward elevator side

poseMap.allowedGesture: low compact explanatory hand, ledger held close, feet planted
poseMap.forbiddenCEOOrCRODrift: pointing, podium speech, revenue-board pitch, aggressive follow-up energy
poseMap.motionAffordance: hand opens and returns below chest; face remains unobstructed

poseMap.relationshipJob: Protect the user's threshold without becoming security or executive command.
poseMap.allowedGesture: gentle side-step boundary, one hand steadying bell or ledger, concerned eyes
poseMap.forbiddenCEOOrCRODrift: combat stance, command point, blocking the frame, crisis CEO pose, pipeline urgency
poseMap.rowanHintPolicy: old elevator key can remain on ring if already present, not centered
poseMap.motionAffordance: slight body turn between user and pressure source

poseMap.relationshipJob: Show ritual care and lightly foreshadow the building's memory systems.
poseMap.allowedGesture: ledger task, keycard check, small front-desk admin motion
poseMap.forbiddenCEOOrCRODrift: executive signing ceremony, war-room analysis, performance dashboard focus
poseMap.rowanHintPolicy: exactly one small access-memory cue allowed: worn index-card bookmark, old elevator key, or pale card corner
poseMap.motionAffordance: page tap, keycard sort, brief satisfied smile

globalPoseRule: Every pose should be readable as receiving, orienting, and threshold-keeping before it reads as managing, selling, judging, or archiving.
